items.name: Damascus Puukko
items.description:
A Puukko knife is a traditional Finnish utility knife used for all sorts of utilities.

A Puukko Knife is used to sculpt and whittle, to bore or engrave, to skin game animals and to gut fish, to cut prey into pieces. A particularly skilled user can craft beautifully cut useable items with it, even gifts for brides. A camper can with his Puukko craft, if needed, a shelter, build a campfire, feed himself and even get out of a hole in the ice.

Conscripts in the Finnish military are generally supposed to bring their own Puukko or buy one. It is the common tradition of the Finnish military. Usually conscripts sculpt the handle and the blade themselves  and add ready-made fittings and nails to it. They will bring the finished Puukko into the military training and use it for aforementioned things as well as other utility purposes.

Tags: Finland, Finnish, Suomi, Puukko, Knife, Crafting, Craft, Lumi, Jää, Ice, Snow, Survival, Selviytyminen, Survivor, Selviytyjä, Veitsi, Tool, Työkalu
